commands.name: new-ghostty-window
commands.title: New Ghostty Window
commands.description: Launch a new window in Ghostty

commands.name: new-ghostty-tab
commands.title: New Ghostty Tab
commands.description: Launch a new tab in Ghostty

commands.name: search-ghostty-tab
commands.title: Search Ghostty Tabs
commands.subtitle: Ghostty
commands.description: List all tabs and go to the selected.

commands.title: Open Ghostty Launch Configuration
commands.description: Open Ghostty with a specific configuration

commands.name: open-ghostty-workspace
commands.title: Open Workspace from Git Repos
commands.description: List git repos in a directory and open with your launch configuration

preferences.title: Workspaces Parent Directory
preferences.description: Directory to scan for git repos (used by Open Workspace from Git Repos)

preferences.name: workspaceScanDepth
preferences.title: Workspace Scan Depth
preferences.description: Max depth to scan for git repositories

commands.name: open-with-ghostty
commands.title: Open with Ghostty
commands.description: Open the currently selected Finder item with Ghostty

preferences.name: openWithGhosttyMode
preferences.title: Open In
preferences.description: Open selected Finder folder in new window or new tab

commands.name: view-ghostty-config
commands.title: Edit Ghostty Config
commands.description: View and edit the Ghostty configuration file (~/.config/ghostty/config)

preferences.name: workspaceParentDirectory
preferences.title: Workspaces Parent Directory
preferences.description: Directory to scan for git repos (used by Open Workspace from Git Repos)

preferences.name: workspaceScanDepth
preferences.title: Workspace Scan Depth
preferences.description: Max depth to scan for git repositories

preferences.name: autoFocusGhostty
preferences.title: Auto Focus on Tab Selection
preferences.label: Move cursor to selected tab
preferences.description: Move cursor to the selected tab after selecting it

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
